title: Isalathiso Primary wins soccer competition
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Mossel Bay's Isalathiso Primary School has won an annual soccer competition in Pacaltsdorp, George.

It defended its winning title for the second time in a row at the McAlpine Rangers George DreamEvent 2024, held at the Pacaltsdorp sports grounds.

U13 soccer and netball players

About 16 primary schools from Mossel Bay and George competed in the event, which was for U13 soccer and netball players, on Saturday, 25 May.

Isalathiso played three matches against different primary schools and won all three.

The scores were: Quarterfinals against Tyholorha: 3-2, semi-finals against Thabatha: 1-0, finals against Thembalethu: 3-1.

The winning Isalathiso team with (left) teacher Aphiwe Mpandle, coach Luvolwethu Rooiland and (right) sports coordinator Mvelontle Golimpi, Dreamfields project coordinator Lebogang Rankoe and coach Lindile Matakane.  Isalathiso Primary coach Luvolwethu Rooiland, sports coordinator Mvelontle Golimpi, coach Lindile Matakane and teacher Aphiwe Mphandle.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
